Name: UniRelo
Description: Unirelo is an international moving company that provides comprehensive relocation services for individuals and families worldwide. They offer a range of services including customs clearance, packing, shipping, storage, and 24/7 support throughout the move process. With over 20 years of experience, Unirelo specializes in both domestic and commercial relocations, ensuring smooth movement from the US to various global destinations. Their team is fully insured, trained, and equipped to handle complex moves efficiently, with a focus on customer satisfaction and transparent pricing.

Name: Up/Down Moving & Logistics
Description: Up/Down Moving & Logistics is a third-party logistics company that specializes in residential and long-distance moving, warehousing, and home delivery services. They offer tailored solutions for moves of various sizes, including furniture, art, and household items, ensuring efficient handling and assembly. The company emphasizes customer service, honest pricing, and has over 27 years of experience in the logistics industry, providing professional movers and reliable logistics support throughout the move process.

Name: USA Home Listings
Description: USA Home Listings is an automated marketing platform designed for moving and storage companies. It helps users find fresh new homeowners listings, manage direct mail campaigns (such as phone numbers, emails, and vacancy data), and generate targeted advertising to attract potential clients. Key features include a streamlined process for listing management, real-time lead generation, and the ability to create tailored marketing strategies that align with business goals. The platform aims to streamline operations and enhance sales processes for its users.

Name: US Equipment Co
Description: US Equipment Co. specializes in selling franchise equipment, particularly furniture and fixtures, to individuals planning to close stores. The service eliminates middlemen such as dealers and auctioneers, providing a streamlined process that includes no fees or commissions, and offers high-quality sales at significantly higher prices than traditional methods. US Equipment Co., which manages the entire sale process from concept development to completion, ensuring transparency and efficiency throughout. They also offer customized marketing strategies to attract potential buyers while minimizing risks associated with re-selling.

Name: Vanguardian International, LLC
Description: Vanguardian International is a door-to-door moving service that specializes in residential and commercial relocations worldwide. They offer full range of services including packing, shipping, storage, and transportation to over 50 countries, with typical delivery times of 30-60 days. The company provides free estimates, customized relocation routes, and fully insured moves, ensuring quality service backed by 15 years of experience and environmental responsibility.

Name: U.S. Truck Body
Description: U.S. Truck Body is a manufacturer of custom box van bodies designed for the transportation industry, specializing in various types of vans including aluminum, fiberglass reinforced plywood (FRP), Dura Plate, and moving bodies. The company offers a range of products tailored to meet specific needs, utilizing high-quality materials and manufacturing practices. U.S., Inc. provides services such as one-day mounting, parts, and customer support to help customers quickly get their truck bodies on the go.

Name: Value Truck
Description: Value Truck is a logistics company that provides transportation services for businesses and individuals across North America. Their main offerings include cross-border shipping, dry van shipping, refrigerated shipping, open deck shipping, and vehicle relocation services. Key features include 24/7 customer support, competitive pricing without hidden fees, and a fleet of over 500 trailers, ensuring safe and timely delivery of goods. They operate from multiple terminals in the US and Mexico, focusing on tailored shipping solutions to meet specific logistical needs.

Name: Vehicle Installs, LLC
Description: Vehicle Installs, LLC provides aftermarket electronics and telematics installation services for commercial fleets, including school buses, municipal vehicles, emergency response units, government agencies, and heavy equipment. Their main functionality is to enhance vehicle safety, efficiency, and performance through custom integration solutions such as GPS tracking systems, vehicle camera installations, and driver behavior monitoring. The company emphasizes project management and customer satisfaction, offering tailored consultations to optimize fleet operations and ensure smooth deployment.

Name: VGS Logistics
Description: VGS Logistics is a moving company that provides office relocation and facility management services in Portland, Seattle, and Boise. Their main functionality includes planning and executing complex workplace moves, including office decommission, furniture systems installation, and secure storage solutions. Key features include specialized move management, data-driven layouts for space optimization, safe transport of sensitive assets, and the rental of office moving crates and shelving. They also offer customized post-move support to ensure smooth transitions and minimize disruptions during office relocations.

Name: Vision Logistics
Description: Vision Logistics is a family-owned logistics company that offers a range of services including high-value ground transportation, data center relocation, local cargo, and hot shot deliveries. The company focuses on providing personalized logistics solutions tailored to meet individual customer needs, ensuring safety and reliability throughout the process. Key features include a personal account manager available 24/7, competitive pricing, and a commitment to meeting specific business goals through attention to detail.

Name: Voxme Software Inc.
Description: Voxme is a moving company CRM software designed for Packers and Movers to manage various removal processes. It offers features such as digital inventory management, job-specific label printing, virtual survey tools, and an integrated virtual survey app for conducting pre-move surveys. Users can access the platform through a cloud-based portal, generate PDF reports, and print barcode labels with their own or partner Zebra printers, all while ensuring compliance with regulations like DOD and DOT. The software is available for a monthly fee of $300, which includes a basic setup package and additional charges for job creation and reporting.

Name: Wakefield Moving & Storage Services, LLC
Description: Wakefield is a company that provides moving, storage, logistics, and installation services for various industries, including universities, hospitals, and government. Their main functionality includes managing commercial moves, warehouse operations, and installations tailored to meet specific client needs. Key features include fast response times, specialized crews, and a focus on sustainability in their operations. Wakefield also offers resources such as moving guides and educational materials to support effective workplace solutions.

Name: Wald Relocation Services, Ltd.
Description: The website offers a range of services and resources for businesses, focusing on corporate relocation, training, and marketing strategies. It provides information on various services such as business consulting, legal assistance, and financial support for clients in the financial sector. Key features include personalized service, expert guidance, and professional advice, and access to a network of over 1,000 companies for business needs. The site also facilitates partnerships with major corporations for business development and investment in technology.

Name: Waypoint Investments
Description: Waypoint Investments is a family-owned moving and storage company that offers residential and commercial moving services across multiple states in the southeastern United States. Their main functionality includes providing reliable moving solutions, managing operations, and ensuring customer satisfaction through a commitment to employee well-being and safety. Key features include a network of over 300 locations, a focus on strategic growth, and a commitment for maintaining high financial performance for their clients.

Name: We Define IT
Description: We Define IT is a managed IT services provider based in Brooklyn, NY, offering a range of technology solutions for businesses. Their main functionalities include remote workforce support, cybersecurity services, cloud computing, data backup and recovery, hardware and repair, and compliance support. They cater to various industries such as healthcare, education, retail, and finance, providing tailored IT solutions that enhance business operations and security. Key features include 24/7 help desk support, customized IT strategies, and comprehensive IT consulting to meet specific client needs.

Name: Wil-Can Logistics Toronto
Description: Wil-Can Logistics Toronto is a logistics company that provides local and international moving services across Canada. They offer door-to-door household goods moves, storage solutions in over 10,000 square feet of warehouse space, and flexible shipping options for both commercial and ocean transport. With 30 years of experience, Wil-Can focuses on delivering reliable service with competitive pricing, ensuring customer satisfaction through professional staff and effective communication.

Name: Wildmor Advisors
Description: The website offers resources and information for individuals seeking to improve their online presence, particularly in the context of climate change. It provides details on various topics such as energy efficiency, cybersecurity, and the impact of natural disasters like CO2 emissions. Users can find specific tips for improving their online safety and understanding of global climate conditions, along with a collection of educational materials related to climate adaptation and resilience.

Name: WilsonSafe
Description: WilsonSafe.com is a full-service provider of safes and vault solutions for businesses, residential homes, and commercial properties. The website offers a wide range of products including high security safes, depository safes (such as cash management and medical), fire safes for home protection, and various types of safe doors. Key features include 24/7 support for safety issues, customized service plans, and a selection of pre-owned items designed to meet specific customer needs.

Name: Windsor Art & Design Transportation
Description: Windsor Art & Design Transportation provides specialized shipping, inventory management, storage, and installation services for art and sculptures. Their main functionality includes international shipping, local collection, custom crate design, customs clearance, and relocation support for auction houses. They focus on meeting client needs while ensuring high-quality service through a structured process that includes project site measurement, quality control, and dedicated installation teams.

Name: Winter Moving & Storage
Description: Winter Moving & Storage is a moving agency based in Northwest Arkansas that offers secure storage and hauling services for both residential and commercial clients. The company provides free estimates, packing assistance, and has received multiple awards for its quality service and customer satisfaction. They also offer international shipping solutions and have a dedicated blog with moving tips and resources to assist customers during their moves.

Name: W.W. Cannon, LLC
Description: W.W. Cannon provides a range of material handling and industrial storage solutions for various industries, including automotive and retail. Their main services include the installation and maintenance of equipment such as conveyor systems, load dock and door solutions, and workplace safety products. They also offer modular building solutions to enhance operational efficiency and reduce downtime. Additionally, W.W., Cannon features specialized products like fall protection systems, mezzanine shelving, and mobile storage options.

Name: XFER
Description: XFER is an IT support and consulting company that provides managed services for small and medium-sized businesses in Michigan. Their main functionalities include IT consulting, remote monitoring, cybersecurity solutions, cloud computing, and business continuity planning. XFER offers 24/7 help desk support, professional server support, and tailored IT strategies to enhance operational efficiency and security for various industries such as finance, manufacturing, and retail.

Name: RXL Global Logistics LLC
Description: RXL Global Logistics LLC is an international freight carrier based in Yorkville, Illinois. The company offers a variety of transportation services including Full Truckload (FTL), Less Than Truckload(LTL), Partial Truckload, and Door-to-Door delivery. They specialize in corporate relocation for large moves, ensuring safe and timely deliveries of office equipment and sensitive materials across U.S., as well as providing warehousing and storage solutions to support supply chain needs. RXL Global Logistic LLC also emphasizes customer satisfaction through reliable service and professional handling of shipments.

Name: YorkHoist
Description: YorkHoist is a company that specializes in the design, manufacturing, and repair of overhead cranes and hoists. Their main services include custom crane construction, OSHA inspections, load test solutions, and 24/7 emergency repair for equipment. YorkHoist also offers a range of industrial supplies such as personnel transportation lifts, fall protection systems, and material storage solutions to enhance productivity and safety in various industries.

Name: New Roots Relocation
Description: New Roots Relocation is a relocation service that provides customized relocation support for individuals and organizations across Canada. They offer a range of services including corporate, personal, and destination relocation assistance, as well as specialized programs for healthcare, mining, construction, energy, and more. Their team of experienced relocation specialists works closely with clients to create tailored relocation plans that meet their specific needs and budgets, ensuring smooth transitions throughout the process.

Name: Your Senior Team
Description: Your Senior Team is a platform that connects seniors with licensed professionals and services for various needs, including senior living, real estate, insurance, financial planning, and veteran affairs. Users can search for independent 55+ communities, assisted living options, life insurance, and moving assistance, all while receiving support from elder law attorneys and financial advisors. The service allows users to connect directly with certified professionals without the pressure of salespeople, providing access to a wide range of products and services tailored for seniors.
